Control Objective: Validate that the Enterprise Technology Policy is approved versioned and maintained as the governing policy authority.
Validate that material technology changes receive ARB review before implementation.
Audit Method: Sample ARB records against change population

Control Objective: Validate that architecture artifacts standards patterns and decisions are retained in the authoritative repository.
Validate that governance objects use the canonical metadata schema.
Validate that controlled policy and standard artifacts are listed in the Master Document Register.
Validate that mandatory technology policy requirements are uniquely identified owned and mapped.
Validate that policy requirements are mapped to control objectives owners evidence and audit method.
Validate that requirements and controls maintain traceability to regulatory and framework obligations.
Regulatory / Framework Mapping: FFIEC; OCC; FDIC; FRB; NIST; CIS; ISO

Control Objective: Validate that architecture decisions reference approved principles where applicable.
Validate that material technology changes map to business capabilities and business services.
Audit Method: Sample ARB records against capability maps

Control Objective: Validate that application portfolio records include owner lifecycle criticality risk and disposition fields.
Validate that technologies are classified by approved lifecycle state.
Validate that EOL/EOS technologies are tracked remediated or formally excepted.
Validate that cloud architectures use approved landing zone and security patterns.
Audit Method: Architecture review and policy compliance check
Regulatory / Framework Mapping: FFIEC AIO; NIST CSF; CIS; ISO

Control Objective: Validate that infrastructure architectures document hosting capacity resilience boundaries and support model.
Validate that network architectures document segmentation routing ingress egress and resilience requirements.
Validate that high-risk and material technology changes receive security architecture review.
Validate that identity access authentication authorization and privileged access patterns are documented.
Audit Method: Design review and IAM evidence inspection

Control Objective: Validate that data classification protection encryption retention and privacy requirements are documented.
Regulatory / Framework Mapping: GLBA; SEC Reg S-P; NIST 800-53; ISO

Control Objective: Validate that APIs integrations and events follow ownership versioning security observability and reuse standards.
Validate that policy standards controls and evidence requirements are integrated into engineering lifecycle gates.
Regulatory / Framework Mapping: NIST SSDF; NIST CSF; CIS; FFIEC

Control Objective: Validate that material ARB decisions include required evidence pack artifacts.
Validate that exceptions and waivers are documented approved time-bound monitored and remediated.
Validate that material solutions document availability recovery continuity dependencies and failover expectations.
Regulatory / Framework Mapping: FRB Operational Resilience; FFIEC; NIST CSF

Control Objective: Validate that backup recovery retention and restoration evidence exists for material systems and data stores.
Validate that observability logging alerting telemetry and support model requirements are implemented for material systems.
Validate that third-party products SaaS managed services and externally hosted technology receive architecture and risk review.
Validate that buy versus build decisions evaluate strategic fit integration complexity risk cost controls and lifecycle impact.

Control Name: AI and Emerging Technology Governance Control
Control Objective: Validate that AI and emerging technology use cases follow governance risk security data privacy and model oversight requirements.
Regulatory / Framework Mapping: NIST AI RMF; Model Risk Guidance; FFIEC

Control Objective: Validate that architecture intent application records services and configuration items align to approved CMDB and CSDM models.
Validate that architecture roles skills communities and knowledge sharing mechanisms are maintained.
Validate that policy standards lifecycle exceptions and control-plane metrics are reported to accountable stakeholders.
Regulatory / Framework Mapping: FFIEC Management; OCC; COBIT; NIST CSF
